title: Engine scrollytelling triggers animations and overlay changes with incremental scroll
description: Verifies incremental scrolling on Engine causes observable animation progress and synchronized overlay content changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /engine
Wait for the page to finish initial render
Scroll down by a small amount
Scroll down by another small amount
Verify the visual animation/canvas output changes as scroll progresses
Verify overlay text/content changes as the user scrolls through sections

title: Navigate from Home to Capabilities via global navigation
description: Verifies a user can move from Home to Capabilities and the Capabilities page renders after a smooth transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to Capabilities
Verify the user lands on the Capabilities page and Capabilities content is displayed
Verify the page transition completes without a blank or partially rendered page state

title: Homepage 3D hero loads and remains interactive on desktop
description: Verifies the homepage 3D hero scene loads, occupies the hero area, and responds to basic user interaction and scroll.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero section to finish initial render
Scroll down slightly
Scroll back to the top
Verify a 3D/canvas hero scene is displayed in the hero area
Verify the hero scene remains present and does not disappear after scrolling

title: Engine scrollytelling remains smooth through full scroll length and back up
description: Verifies the Engine experience continues updating to the bottom and remains synchronized when scrolling back upward.

steps.description: Navigate to /engine
Wait for the page to finish initial render
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Scroll back to the top of the page
Verify the animation/canvas remains visible and updates throughout the full scroll range
Verify overlay content remains present and does not desynchronize into a blank state during reverse scrolling

title: Mobile drawer navigation to Capabilities closes drawer and transitions
description: Verifies on a mobile viewport the navigation drawer opens, route changes to Capabilities, and the drawer closes after navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set viewport to a mobile size under 768px wide
Open the navigation menu
Click the navigation link to Capabilities
Verify the user lands on the Capabilities page and the navigation drawer is closed
Verify the Capabilities page is fully rendered after the transition

title: Homepage 3D hero scales and remains usable at tablet viewport
description: Verifies the 3D hero scene scales to a 768px-wide viewport without clipping or overlapping core content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set viewport to 768px by 1024px
Wait for the hero section to finish initial render
Verify a 3D/canvas hero scene is visible and fits within the viewport without clipping key areas
Verify the navigation and hero content are not overlapping in a way that blocks interaction

title: Homepage 3D hero does not overlap navigation at mobile viewport
description: Verifies the homepage hero and navigation remain usable on a small mobile viewport without overlapping or blocking primary controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set viewport to 375px by 667px
Wait for the hero section to finish initial render
Verify the hero area is displayed without obscuring the global navigation controls
Verify the page remains scrollable and the hero remains visible during initial scroll

title: Direct-entry to Engine initializes scrollytelling
description: Verifies loading the Engine route directly initializes the scrollytelling experience and displays the canvas and overlay content.

steps.description: Navigate to /engine
Wait for the page to finish initial render
Verify the Engine scrollytelling layout is displayed with a visible animation/canvas area
Verify overlay text/content is present on the page

title: Direct-entry to Capabilities renders correctly
description: Verifies loading the Capabilities route directly renders the correct page content without requiring prior navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /capabilities
Verify the Capabilities page content is displayed
Verify global navigation is present and the page is interactable

title: Rapid route switching does not leave blank or stuck state
description: Verifies rapid navigation across routes does not result in a blank screen and the final route renders correctly with transitions completing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to Engine
Click the navigation link to Capabilities
Click the navigation link to Home
Verify the user lands on the Home page and the hero section is displayed
Verify the page is fully rendered without missing primary content areas

title: Engine handles fast, erratic scrolling without losing render
description: Verifies rapid scroll jumps do not cause the Engine canvas or overlays to disappear or leave a torn/blank state.

steps.description: Navigate to /engine
Wait for the page to finish initial render
Scroll down quickly by a large amount
Scroll up quickly by a large amount
Verify the animation/canvas area is still displayed after the rapid scrolling
Verify overlay content is still displayed and the page remains interactable
